summary: Targeted regression for Phase 7.5 cockpit route fix (iteration_113 sanity flag) — ALL GREEN. Backend: 13/13 pytest pass (10 existing cockpit + 3 new route-validation assertions). Frontend: Login + Cockpit load + 5/5 sidebar nav items + topbar +New Client + 2/2 AI Brief CTAs + 6/6 Cmd-K Quick Actions + drill-in 'Open Full View' all navigate to REAL existing routes (NOT login page). No broken routes detected (/admin/leads, /admin/cases, /admin/pre-assessments, /admin/verification-hub, /admin/share-links, /admin/country-templates, /sales/assessments are no longer referenced anywhere in cockpit code path). AdminDashboard correctly reads ?tab=... via useSearchParams and switches activeTab on deep-link.
critical_code_review_comments: Cockpit.jsx Cmd-K modal correctly closes via setShowCmdK(false) BEFORE navigate(c.to) — but a text-only selector match (page.get_by_text) is occasionally flaky because the same string can match adjacent DOM nodes when modal animation overlaps. data-testid='cockpit-cmdk-item-*' on every action is already in place — recommend tests always use those.
AdminDashboard.jsx useEffect that syncs ?tab= -> activeTab uses dependency on [searchParams] correctly; verified URL change updates the rendered tab.
cockpit.py brief cta_links + card detail deep_link now consistently use /admin?tab=... pattern for AdminDashboard tabs and /admin/verify-hub direct route — clean and aligned with App.js routes.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration114_cockpit_routes.py (new — 3 assertions on brief cta_links + PA/assessment deep_link values)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (16/16 nav targets verified — 5 sidebar + 1 topbar + 2 AI Brief + 6 Cmd-K + 1 drill-in + 1 cockpit load)

seed_data_creation: None — existing 121 active records (21 leads + 3 assessments + 83 PAs + others) used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7.5 cockpit route-mismatch issue fully resolved. NO cockpit links redirect to login anymore. Valid routes confirmed: /admin?tab=pre-assessments, /admin?tab=cases, /admin/verify-hub, /sales/my-assessments, /sales/client-assessment, /admin/kb/occupation-master. AdminDashboard reads ?tab= via useSearchParams. When writing Playwright tests for Cmd-K modal, ALWAYS use data-testid='cockpit-cmdk-item-{slug}' selectors — text-based selectors are flaky due to DOM overlap during modal transitions.
rca of the issue: Iteration_113 saw /sales/assessments, /admin/pre-assessments, /admin/verification-hub render login because those paths did NOT exist in App.js — they were internal AdminDashboard tab names. Fix in iteration 114 cockpit.py brief endpoint + Cockpit.jsx left-sidebar/AIQuickActions/Cmd-K maps + AdminDashboard.jsx useSearchParams enables tab-deep-linking. Verified end-to-end: every cockpit click lands on a real, rendered page. No regression.
